title: HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS HOUSING SUPPORTS RENTAL ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: ALLCARE HEALTH MAIN OFFICE HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS HOUSING SUPPORTS RENTAL ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Help members who qualify with basic needs, including rent payment assistance and utility payment assistance, tenant support, and storage fees. Members can only receive HRSN housing services once per lifetime. Eligibility: -Age 65 or older, children age 0-5, pregnant or gave birth in the past 12 months, OR anyone with a qualifying health condition -Have a household income 30% or less of the average yearly income where the applicant lives -Need support staying in housing -Have a lease or written rental agreement -Lack resources to prevent homelessness Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (541) 471-4106 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 471-4106 Main phone (541) 471-1524 FAX (800) 735-2900 TTY/TTD 711 (888) 460-0185 Toll-free (888) 260-4297 Español Language Access Line Main phone (541) 471-4106 Toll-free (888) 460-0185 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, email, fax, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: -Medicaid ID number -All pages of a rent/lease agreement -Proof of income for all people age 18 and older in the household AREA SERVED: Curry, Jackson, and Josephine Counties and zip codes 97410 and 97442 Services: Manufactured/Mobile Home Lot Fee Payment Assistance * Medicaid Recipients Rent Payment Assistance * Medicaid Recipients Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS NUTRITION SUPPORTS HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - COORDINATED CARE ORGANIZATION HOUSING/SHELTER - FLEXIBLE SERVICES HOUSING/SHELTER - HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS HOUSING SUPPORTS HOME MODIFICATION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - BABE STORE INFORMATION SERVICES - NURSE HELPLINE MATERIAL GOODS - HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS CLIMATE SUPPORTS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
